inputs.label: Initial Velocity
inputs.businessContext: The initial speed of the projectile at launch

inputs.label: Launch Angle
inputs.businessContext: The angle of launch relative to horizontal

inputs.label: Projectile Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the projectile, used for kinetic energy calculation

inputs.label: Launch Height
inputs.businessContext: Height above ground from which projectile is launched. 0 for ground level.

formulas.maxHeight: (initialVelocity * initialVelocity * Math.sin(angle * Math.PI / 180) * Math.sin(angle * Math.PI / 180)) / (2 * gravity) + launchHeight
formulas.timeOfFlight: (initialVelocity * Math.sin(angle * Math.PI / 180) + Math.sqrt((initialVelocity * Math.sin(angle * Math.PI / 180)) * (initialVelocity * Math.sin(angle * Math.PI / 180)) + 2 * gravity * launchHeight)) / gravity
formulas.range: initialVelocity * Math.cos(angle * Math.PI / 180) * ((initialVelocity * Math.sin(angle * Math.PI / 180) + Math.sqrt((initialVelocity * Math.sin(angle * Math.PI / 180)) * (initialVelocity * Math.sin(angle * Math.PI / 180)) + 2 * gravity * launchHeight)) / gravity)
